data.content:
# Implementation Review — REQUEST CHANGES

The audit on `8e930697` is **not complete**. Acceptance criteria says **every** test file under `src/**/__tests__/` is hermetic — many remain non-hermetic. The audit only inspected `child_process` / `node:fs/promises` patterns and missed two large categories.

## Category A — `node:fs/promises` fixture tests still in default suite (audit miss)

Each one currently uses real `mkdtemp` / `mkdir` / `writeFile` / `rm` against the real fs (no `vi.mock("node:fs/promises", ...)`):

- src/lib/__tests__/agent-history-coverage.test.ts (mkdtemp + writeFile + rm + zlib)
- src/lib/__tests__/agent-history-summaries.test.ts (mkdtemp + mkdir + writeFile + rm)
- src/lib/__tests__/agent-history-sessions.test.ts (mkdtemp + mkdir + writeFile + rm)
- src/lib/__tests__/agent-message-type-index.test.ts (mkdtemp + mkdir + writeFile + rm)
- src/lib/__tests__/agent-message-type-index-coverage.test.ts (mkdtemp + mkdir + writeFile + rm)
- src/lib/__tests__/agent-outcome-stats.test.ts (mkdtemp + readFile + rm)
- src/lib/__tests__/lease-audit.test.ts (mkdtemp + mkdir + writeFile + readFile + rm)
- src/lib/__tests__/log-lifecycle.test.ts (real fs/promises + createReadStream)
- src/lib/__tests__/server-logger.test.ts (mkdtemp + readFile + readdir + rm)
- src/lib/__tests__/orchestration-plan-manager.test.ts (real readFile)
- src/lib/__tests__/gitignore-settings.test.ts (real readFile)

Sync-fs siblings (mkdtempSync / writeFileSync / rmSync) the same audit also missed:
- src/lib/__tests__/auto-routing-integration.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/backend-factory-auto.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/backend-factory-coverage.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/backends-mark-terminal-parity.test.ts (`promises as fs` from `node:fs`)
- src/lib/__tests__/beads-backend-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/beads-backend-lifecycle.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/beads-backend-filters.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/beads-backend-coverage-state.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/beads-backend-coverage-filters.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/beads-backend-coverage-match.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/beads-workflow-integration.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/beat-invalidation-consistency.test.ts (`import fs from "node:fs"`)
- src/lib/__tests__/console-log-tap.test.ts (rmSync on `process.cwd()/.foolery-logs-test-tap` — also a real-cwd write)
- src/lib/__tests__/doctor-checks-settings-validate.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/validate-cwd.test.ts (`validateCwd(process.cwd())` reads the host cwd)

## Category B — "Contract" tests reading source from disk via `process.cwd()` + `readFileSync` (entire pattern was missed)

Hermetic policy explicitly bans real cwd reads. Every one of these does `readFileSync(path.join(process.cwd(), "src/components/...tsx"), "utf8")` (or equivalent) at module load:

- src/lib/__tests__/alias-view-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/app-header-create-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox-width.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/beats-client-fanout-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/beats-page-layout.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/history-beat-id-copy-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/history-detail-toggle-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/history-terminal-theme-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/release-runtime-artifact-workflow.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/repo-switch-loading-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/repo-switcher-all-repos-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/retake-action-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/retake-lightbox-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/retake-row-layout.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/retakes-fetch-failure-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/retakes-pagination-layout.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/retakes-query-enabled.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/setlist-query-key-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/settings-dispatch-global-swap-layout.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/settings-pools-grouping.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/settings-pools-layout.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/settings-sheet-layout.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/terminal-scroll-layout-contract.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/url-state-sync-reload.test.ts
- src/components/__tests__/app-header-parts.test.ts
- src/components/__tests__/beat-row-ship-correction.test.ts (`* as fs`)
- src/components/__tests__/bulk-refine-scope.test.ts
- src/components/__tests__/bulk-ship-action.test.ts
- src/components/__tests__/create-more-draft-reset.test.ts
- src/components/__tests__/final-cut-view-tabs.test.ts
- src/components/__tests__/header-actions-refine-scope.test.ts
- src/components/__tests__/interactive-session-timeout-controls.test.ts
- src/components/__tests__/notification-bell-approval-link.test.ts
- src/components/__tests__/setlist-view.test.ts
- src/components/__tests__/terminal-theme-controls.test.ts
- src/app/beats/__tests__/use-beat-actions-refine-scope.test.ts

## How to verify the gap

```sh
# Should be empty (excluding mock-only matches) when implementation is complete:
rg -l 'from "node:fs"|from "node:fs/promises"' src --glob 'src/**/__tests__/**'
rg -ln 'process\.(cwd|chdir|env)' src --glob 'src/**/__tests__/**'
```

Today both return dozens of files. The "hostile-mode matrix" in the prior handoff doesn't catch these because:
- Real fs writes under `os.tmpdir()` succeed regardless of host config.
- `process.cwd()` reads succeed from the repo root (which `bun run test` always uses).

Hermeticity is a static-policy property, not just "did it pass on my laptop". The audit's grep set needs to include `node:fs`, `node:fs/promises`, `process\.cwd`, `process\.chdir` in addition to `child_process`.

## Disposition guidance

- **Category A (fs fixture tests)**: most are eligible to move to `src/**/__manual_tests__/` following the same pattern as `interaction-logger.test.ts`. A couple (e.g. `agent-message-type-index.test.ts`) may be cheaply mockable via `vi.mock("node:fs/promises", ...)` if the SUT only reads a handful of paths.
- **Category B (contract tests)**: these read source files just to grep for substrings. Two clean options:
  1. Move to `__manual_tests__/` (lowest-effort, preserves coverage).
  2. Refactor to import the modules directly and assert on exported AST/strings — but that's a much bigger refactor and likely not in scope.
  Recommendation: move them, mirroring the precedent set for `app-update.test.ts` in this same audit.

Acceptance is unchanged: "Each test file under `src/**/__tests__/` is hermetic." Rolling back to implementation for a complete pass.
